text:
Once upon a time, there was a young girl named Daisy. She loved adventure and dreamt of exploring far-off lands. One sunny afternoon, she borrowed her grandmother’s old van. She hit the open road, humming her favorite ballad.

Daisy drove late into the evening, marveling at the starry night. Suddenly bored, she stopped the van near a quaint town. Its cobblestone streets and wooden signages greeted her warmly.

She wandered down the cobblestone path, her heart fluttering. She spotted a friendly old bookshop owner offering reading sessions. A thick volume on ancient myths opened itself to a forgotten tale. Intrigued, Daisy sat. The book spoke of a land where everyone could shape reality.

Daisy imagined herself navigating that mystery land. She thought about the adventures ahead, the mystical animals, the hidden treasures. Her heart swelled.

Next, the old bookshop owner invited her to the town's annual folktale festival. Here she'd learn
